title: Better Lily Pads
description: A texturepack that makes lily pads less, or maybe even not ugly.
body:
## A resourcepack that gives lily pads a whole new texture, with 5 randomly appearing variants varying in shapes and sizes. 

![An image full of lily pads in water](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/385fea1b4bfca1aebbcf921ae6bee5581fc3e6f0.png)
- Changes the colour to a warmer, and brighter shade of green.
- With Optifine the colour will slightly change depending on the surrounding biome, as seen in picture 2.

I publish all of my resourcepacks for **free**, and ad revenue is usually around 3$ per month from all of them combined, so any donations are very appreciated.

[![A pixelart of the word "donate"](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92ff631c976bd58fbb443ae89158499badb2a6b7.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=B75MGYUT2UCDC)

### If you want to report a bug or have a suggestion, you can message me on discord @aspoleczne
